title: 第1周 第4天 — 定义条款（Definitions Clause）
objective: 掌握合同定义条款中的核心词汇和固定搭配，理解 shall mean、as used herein、including without limitation 等法律表达的精确含义，学会阅读和起草合同定义条款。

blocks.html: 上节回顾：第2天学习了合同当事人条款（party, hereinafter, whereas, witnesseth, now therefore）和过渡条款的标准格式。今天进入合同正文的第一个核心板块——定义条款（Definitions），它决定了整份合同中关键术语的确切含义。

rows: “Confidential Information” shall mean any information that...
shall have the meaning
shall have the meaning ascribed to it in Section 2.1
as used herein
phr. 如本协议所使用的
As used herein, the following terms shall have the following meanings
unless the context otherwise requires
phr. 除非上下文另有要求
Unless the context otherwise requires, the following terms shall mean...
any affiliate of the Company; affiliate and subsidiary
person
n. 人士（含自然人和法人实体）
“Person” shall mean any individual, corporation, partnership, or other entity
business day
within five (5) business days; a day other than a Saturday, Sunday, or public holiday
on and after the Effective Date; as of the Effective Date
material breach; material adverse effect; material change
including without limitation
including without limitation the following; including but not limited to
adv. 本协议的（= of this Agreement）
Section 3 hereof; the terms hereof; as of the date hereof
adv. 其（= of that / of it）
the terms and conditions thereof; any amendment or modification thereof
shall have the meaning ascribed to it in...; ascribed thereto
as set forth in Schedule A; the definitions set forth herein

blocks.html:
⚠️ 多义词辨析：material
  • 日常英语：材料；物质（名词） / 物质的（形容词）
  • 法律英语：重大的；实质性的（形容词）——这是合同中最常见的含义
  • material breach = 重大违约（非“物质违约”）
  • material adverse effect = 重大不利影响

⚠️ 多义词辨析：person
  • 日常英语：人；个人
  • 法律英语：人士——范围远大于日常用法，涵盖自然人（individual）、公司（corporation）、合伙企业（partnership）、信托（trust）等一切法律主体
  • 合同定义条款中几乎都会对 Person 作扩展定义
以下是定义条款中最常见的固定搭配，这些表达在合同定义部分高频出现，需要整体记忆。

rows: shall mean and refer to

rows.en: “Services” shall mean and refer to the consulting services described in Exhibit A.
rows.zh: 「服务」是指并特指附件 A 中所述的咨询服务。

rows: shall have the meaning ascribed to it in
具有……条款中赋予其的含义

rows.en: “Effective Date” shall have the meaning ascribed to it in Section 12.1 hereof.
rows.zh: 「生效日」具有本协议第 12.1 条赋予的含义。

rows: as used herein, the following terms shall have the following meanings
如本协议所使用的，以下术语具有以下含义

rows.en: As used herein, the following capitalized terms shall have the following meanings.
rows.zh: 在本协议中，以下首字母大写的术语具有下列含义。

rows: unless the context otherwise requires

rows.en: Unless the context otherwise requires, references to Sections are to sections of this Agreement.
rows.zh: 除上下文另有要求外，凡提及「条」均指本协议的条款。

rows: including without limitation

rows.en: Losses shall include, without limitation, damages, liabilities, and reasonable attorneys’ fees.
rows.zh: 「损失」包括但不限于损害赔偿、责任及合理的律师费。

rows: as set forth in

rows.en: The payment terms shall be as set forth in Schedule B hereto.
rows.zh: 付款条款应按照本协议附表 B 的规定执行。

rows: as defined herein

rows.en: Each Affiliate, as defined herein, shall be bound by the terms of this Agreement.
rows.zh: 本协议所定义的每一关联方均应受本协议条款约束。

rows: the meaning ascribed thereto

rows.en: Capitalized terms not defined in this Section shall bear the meaning ascribed thereto elsewhere.
rows.zh: 本条未定义的首字母大写术语应采用本协议其他部分赋予的含义。

blocks.text: 3a. hereof vs. thereof vs. herein vs. therein

rows:
here（本协议）+ of（的）= of this Agreement
例：Section 3 hereof = 本协议第3条

there（该事物）+ of（的）= of that / of it
例：the terms and conditions thereof = 其条款和条件

here（本协议）+ in（在……中）= in this Agreement
例：as used herein = 如本协议所使用的

there（该事物）+ in（在……中）= in that / in it
例：the obligations contained therein = 其中所含的义务

blocks.html:
常见翻译错误：
  • hereof 不要译为“在此之上”或“在此之前”，正确翻译为“本协议的”
  • thereof 不要与 hereof 混淆——hereof 指本协议，thereof 指前文提到的其他事物
3b. shall mean vs. means vs. refers to

rows: 最正式，合同定义条款的标准用法。shall 表示确定性和约束力。
较现代的写法，越来越多的合同采用。与 shall mean 含义相同但更简洁。
较少在定义条款中使用，更多出现在解释性说明中。不如 shall mean 正式。

blocks.html: 3c. including without limitation vs. including but not limited to vs. such as

rows: including without limitation
最常用的合同表达，明确表示列举为示例性而非穷尽性。
与上一个含义完全相同，更口语化。两者可互换。
较口语化，在正式合同中较少使用。可能被法院解读为穷尽性列举。

blocks.html: 1. As used herein, the following terms shall have the following meanings, unless the context otherwise requires: — 如本协议所使用的，除非上下文另有要求，以下术语具有以下含义：
2. Capitalized terms used but not defined in this Section shall have the meanings ascribed to them elsewhere in this Agreement. — 本条中使用但未定义的首字母大写术语，具有本协议其他条款中赋予其的含义。

3. “Affiliate” shall mean, with respect to any Person, any other Person that directly or indirectly controls, is controlled by, or is under common control with such Person. — “关联方”是指就任何人士而言，直接或间接控制该人士、受该人士控制或与该人士受共同控制的任何其他人士。

4. “Business Day” shall mean any day other than a Saturday, Sunday, or any day on which commercial banks in New York City are authorized or required by law to close. — “工作日”是指除星期六、星期日或纽约市商业银行依法被授权或被要求关闭营业的任何日期以外的任何日期。

5. “Confidential Information” shall mean all non-public information disclosed by one party to the other, whether orally, in writing, or in any other form, including without limitation trade secrets, business plans, financial data, and customer lists. — “保密信息”是指一方向另一方披露的所有非公开信息，无论以口头、书面或其他任何形式披露，包括但不限于商业秘密、商业计划、财务数据和客户名单。

6. “Material Adverse Effect” shall mean any event, change, or occurrence that, individually or in the aggregate, has had or would reasonably be expected to have a material adverse effect on the business, financial condition, or results of operations of the Company. — “重大不利影响”是指任何单独或合计已经对公司的业务、财务状况或经营成果产生或可合理预期将产生重大不利影响的事件、变化或事项。

7. “Person” shall mean any individual, corporation, limited liability company, partnership, joint venture, trust, unincorporated organization, governmental authority, or any other entity of any kind. — “人士”是指任何个人、公司、有限责任公司、合伙企业、合营企业、信托、非法人组织、政府机构或任何其他任何类型的实体。
8. “Effective Date” shall have the meaning set forth in Section 12.1 hereof. — “生效日期”具有本协议第12.1条中载明的含义。

9. The term “Losses” shall include, without limitation, any and all damages, liabilities, costs, and expenses, including reasonable attorneys’ fees and court costs. — “损失”一词包括但不限于任何及所有损害赔偿、责任、费用和开支，包括合理的律师费和诉讼费用。

10. Any reference herein to a “Section” or “Article” shall refer to a section or article hereof, and any reference to a “Schedule” shall refer to a schedule attached hereto. — 本协议中对“条”或“章”的任何引用均指本协议的条或章，对“附表”的任何引用均指本协议所附的附表。

💡 here- / there- / where- 家族总结：
  • hereof = of this (Agreement)（本协议的）
  • herein = in this (Agreement)（在本协议中）
  • hereto = to this (Agreement)（对本协议；本协议所附的）
  • thereof = of that / of it（其……的）
  • therein = in that / in it（在其中）
  • thereto = to that / to it（对其）
  • whereby = by which（据此；凭借）

这些词在合同中替代了重复使用合同名称或先行词，使语言更简洁、更正式。

items.title: 长难句 1
items.sentence: “Affiliate” shall mean, with respect to any Person, any other Person that directly or indirectly controls, is controlled by, or is under common control with such Person, where “control” means the possession, directly or indirectly, of the power to direct or cause the direction of the management and policies of a Person, whether through the ownership of voting securities, by contract, or otherwise.
structure: 主干：“Affiliate” shall mean ... any other Person（“关联方”是指……任何其他人士）
限定范围：with respect to any Person（就任何人士而言）
定语从句（三个并列关系）：that directly or indirectly controls, is controlled by, or is under common control with such Person（直接或间接控制该人士、受该人士控制或与该人士受共同控制的）
补充定义“控制”：where “control” means the possession ... of the power to direct or cause the direction of the management and policies（其中“控制”是指拥有……指导或促使指导某人士的管理和政策的权力）
控制的实现方式（三种并列）：whether through the ownership of voting securities, by contract, or otherwise（无论是通过持有有表决权的证券、通过合同或以其他方式）
items.translation: “关联方”是指就任何人士而言，直接或间接控制该人士、受该人士控制或与该人士受共同控制的任何其他人士，其中“控制”是指直接或间接拥有指导或促使指导某人士的管理和政策的权力，无论是通过持有有表决权的证券、通过合同还是以其他方式。

items.title: 长难句 2
items.sentence: “Material Adverse Effect” shall mean any event, change, circumstance, or occurrence that, individually or in the aggregate, has had or would reasonably be expected to have a material adverse effect on (a) the business, assets, financial condition, or results of operations of the Company and its Subsidiaries, taken as a whole, or (b) the ability of the Seller to consummate the transactions contemplated by this Agreement.
structure: 主干：“Material Adverse Effect” shall mean any event, change, circumstance, or occurrence（“重大不利影响”是指任何事件、变化、情况或事项）
定语从句主干：that ... has had or would reasonably be expected to have a material adverse effect on...（已经产生或可合理预期将对……产生重大不利影响的）
插入语：individually or in the aggregate（单独或合计）
影响范围 (a)：the business, assets, financial condition, or results of operations of the Company and its Subsidiaries, taken as a whole（公司及其子公司整体的业务、资产、财务状况或经营成果）
影响范围 (b)：the ability of the Seller to consummate the transactions contemplated by this Agreement（卖方完成本协议拟进行的交易的能力）
关键词：consummate = 完成/达成（交易）；contemplated by = 拟进行的/预期的
items.translation: “重大不利影响”是指任何单独或合计已经对以下事项产生或可合理预期将产生重大不利影响的事件、变化、情况或事项：(a) 公司及其子公司整体的业务、资产、财务状况或经营成果；或 (b) 卖方完成本协议拟进行的交易的能力。

items.title: 长难句 3
items.sentence: Unless the context otherwise requires, (i) words importing the singular include the plural and vice versa, (ii) references to any statute or statutory provision shall include any subordinate legislation made under it, and (iii) any reference to a “day” shall mean a calendar day unless specifically stated to be a Business Day.
structure: 条件状语：Unless the context otherwise requires（除非上下文另有要求）
规则 (i)：words importing the singular include the plural and vice versa（表示单数的词语包含复数含义，反之亦然）
规则 (ii)：references to any statute or statutory provision shall include any subordinate legislation made under it（对任何法规或法律条文的引用均包含据其制定的附属立法）
规则 (iii)：any reference to a “day” shall mean a calendar day unless specifically stated to be a Business Day（对“日”的任何引用均指日历日，除非明确规定为工作日）
关键词：importing = 含有……意义的；subordinate legislation = 附属立法/下位法；vice versa = 反之亦然
items.translation: 除非上下文另有要求：(i) 表示单数的词语包含复数含义，反之亦然；(ii) 对任何法规或法律条文的引用均包含据其制定的附属立法；(iii) 对“日”的任何引用均指日历日，除非明确规定为工作日。

blocks.text: 看到英文术语，想一想中文意思，然后点击展开答案：

blocks.html:
shall mean
是指；系指
shall have the meaning
具有……的含义
as used herein
如本协议所使用的
unless the context otherwise requires
除非上下文另有要求
affiliate
关联方；关联公司
person
人士（含自然人和法人实体）
business day
工作日；营业日
effective date
生效日期
material
重大的；实质性的（非“物质的”）
including without limitation
包括但不限于
hereof
本协议的（= of this Agreement）
thereof
其（= of that / of it）
ascribe
赋予（含义）
set forth
载明；规定；列明

groups.title: 6b. 配对选择：看中文选英文

questions.prompt: 1. 是指；系指（定义条款引导词）
questions.name: m1
questions.answer: shall mean
questions.explanation: shall mean = 是指/系指，定义条款的标准引导词

questions.prompt: 2. 关联方；关联公司
questions.name: m2
questions.answer: affiliate
questions.explanation: affiliate = 关联方/关联公司，指存在控制或共同控制关系的实体

options.value: person
options.html: person

questions.prompt: 3. 本协议的（= of this Agreement）
questions.name: m3
questions.answer: hereof
questions.explanation: hereof = of this Agreement = 本协议的

options.value: as used herein
options.html: as used herein

questions.prompt: 4. 重大的；实质性的
questions.name: m4
questions.answer: material
questions.explanation: material 在合同中 = 重大的/实质性的，非日常的‘材料/物质’

options.html: business day

options.value: including without limitation
options.html: including without limitation

questions.prompt: 5. 载明；规定；列明
questions.name: m5
questions.answer: set forth
questions.explanation: set forth = 载明/规定/列明，法律文书标准用语

options.value: shall have the meaning
options.html: shall have the meaning

questions.prompt: 1. material（合同语境）
questions.name: a1
questions.answer: 重大的；实质性的
questions.explanation: material 在合同法律语境中表示‘重大的、实质性的’，material breach = 重大违约，material adverse effect = 重大不利影响。不要与日常含义‘材料/物质’混淆。

questions.prompt: 2. Person（合同定义条款中）
questions.name: a2
questions.answer: 人士（含自然人和法人实体）
questions.explanation: Person 在合同定义条款中通常被扩展定义为包括自然人、公司、合伙企业、信托等一切法律主体，远超日常含义的‘个人’。

options.value: 人士（含自然人和法人实体）
options.html: 人士（含自然人和法人实体）

questions.prompt: 3. affiliate
questions.name: a3
questions.answer: 关联方；关联公司
questions.explanation: affiliate 指与某一主体存在控制或共同控制关系的其他实体。在合同中通常定义为直接或间接控制、受控制或受共同控制的人士。

questions.prompt: 4. hereof
questions.name: a4
questions.answer: 本协议的（= of this Agreement）
questions.explanation: hereof = here + of = of this Agreement。Section 3 hereof = 本协议第3条。here- 家族词是法律英语的标志性特征。

options.value: 本协议的（= of this Agreement）
options.html: 本协议的（= of this Agreement）

questions.prompt: 5. set forth
questions.name: a5
questions.answer: 载明；规定；列明
questions.explanation: set forth 是法律英语中表示‘载明/规定/列出’的标准搭配。as set forth in = 如……所载明的。

groups.title: 练习B：选词填空
groups.instruction: 选择最恰当的词语填入合同条款空白处。

questions.prompt: 6. “Confidential Information” ______ any non-public information disclosed by either party.
questions.name: b1
questions.answer: shall mean
questions.explanation: shall mean 是合同定义条款中引出定义的标准搭配。‘X’ shall mean... = ‘X’是指……

options.value: is defined as
options.html: is defined as

questions.prompt: 7. “Losses” shall include all damages, liabilities, and expenses, ______ reasonable attorneys’ fees.
questions.name: b2
questions.answer: including without limitation
questions.explanation: including without limitation（包括但不限于）是合同中表示列举不穷尽的标准搭配，确保所列事项仅为示例而非全部。与 including but not limited to 同义。

options.value: including without limitation
options.html: including without limitation

questions.prompt: 8. “Effective Date” ______ Section 12.1 hereof.
questions.name: b3
questions.answer: shall have the meaning ascribed to it in
questions.explanation: shall have the meaning ascribed to it in [Section X] 是合同中交叉引用定义的标准表达。ascribe = 赋予（含义）。

options.value: shall have the meaning ascribed to it in
options.html: shall have the meaning ascribed to it in

questions.prompt: 9. ______, the following capitalized terms shall have the meanings set forth below:
questions.name: b4
questions.answer: As used herein
questions.explanation: As used herein（如本协议所使用的）是定义条款开头的标准引导语，限定术语适用范围为本协议。In this document 是日常表达，不符合法律文书用语规范；For the purpose of 通常用于说明目的而非引出定义；With reference to 表示‘关于/参照’，不是定义条款的惯用引导语。

options.value: As used herein
options.html: As used herein

questions.prompt: 10. ______, the singular shall include the plural and vice versa.
questions.name: b5
questions.answer: Unless the context otherwise requires
questions.explanation: Unless the context otherwise requires（除非上下文另有要求）是定义条款中常见的灵活性限定语，给定义留出解释空间。If not stated differently 是非正式表达，法律文书中不使用；Except when noted 表示‘除非另有注明’，用于脚注而非定义条款；Provided that 表示‘但是/前提是’，用于附加条件而非灵活性限定。

options.value: Unless the context otherwise requires
options.html: Unless the context otherwise requires

questions.prompt: 11. 合同中使用 including without limitation 的目的是什么？
questions.name: c1
questions.answer: 列举仅为示例，不排除未列出的其他事项
questions.explanation: including without limitation / including but not limited to 的功能是声明所列事项仅为示例性列举，避免被解读为穷尽性列举（即不排除其他未列出的事项）。

options.value: 限制列举范围，仅限所列事项
options.html: 限制列举范围，仅限所列事项

options.value: 列举仅为示例，不排除未列出的其他事项
options.html: 列举仅为示例，不排除未列出的其他事项

options.value: 强调所列事项的重要性
options.html: 强调所列事项的重要性

options.value: 表示所列事项需获得批准
options.html: 表示所列事项需获得批准

questions.prompt: 12. hereof 和 thereof 的区别是什么？
questions.name: c2
questions.answer: hereof = of this Agreement（本协议的）; thereof = of that / of it（其……的）
questions.explanation: hereof 中的 here 指代 this Agreement（本协议），thereof 中的 there 指代前文提到的某个事物。两者的区别在于指代对象不同。

options.value: 两者含义相同，可互换使用
options.html: 两者含义相同，可互换使用

options.value: hereof = of this Agreement（本协议的）; thereof = of that / of it（其……的）
options.html: hereof = of this Agreement（本协议的）; thereof = of that / of it（其……的）

options.value: hereof 用于正文，thereof 用于附件
options.html: hereof 用于正文，thereof 用于附件

options.value: hereof 表示过去，thereof 表示将来
options.html: hereof 表示过去，thereof 表示将来

questions.prompt: 13. 为什么合同中需要设置定义条款？
questions.name: c3
questions.answer: 确保合同当事人理解同一术语的含义完全一致，避免歧义和争议
questions.explanation: 定义条款是合同的‘词典’，确保双方对核心术语有统一理解。一旦产生争议，法院会首先依据合同的定义条款来解释术语含义。

options.value: 仅为了使合同看起来更专业
options.html: 仅为了使合同看起来更专业

options.value: 确保合同当事人理解同一术语的含义完全一致，避免歧义和争议
options.html: 确保合同当事人理解同一术语的含义完全一致，避免歧义和争议

options.value: 满足法律法规的强制性要求
options.html: 满足法律法规的强制性要求

options.value: 方便翻译人员理解合同内容
options.html: 方便翻译人员理解合同内容

questions.prompt: 14. material breach 应如何翻译？
questions.name: c4
questions.answer: 重大违约（非‘物质违约’或‘实质违约’）
questions.explanation: material breach 是合同法中的核心概念，指一方当事人对合同核心义务的严重违反，其严重程度足以使另一方有权解除合同或要求损害赔偿。material = 重大的。

options.value: 重大违约（非‘物质违约’或‘实质违约’）
options.html: 重大违约（非“物质违约”或“实质违约”）

questions.prompt: 15. ascribe 在 shall have the meaning ascribed to it 中的含义是什么？
questions.name: c5
questions.answer: 赋予（含义）
questions.explanation: ascribe 在法律语境中常与 meaning 搭配，表示‘赋予含义’。shall have the meaning ascribed to it = 具有赋予其的含义。

groups.title: 练习D：英译中
groups.instruction: 将以下合同定义条款翻译为中文，完成后点击“提交 AI 批改”获取详细批改。

questions.source: As used herein, unless the context otherwise requires, the following capitalized terms shall have the following meanings:
questions.reference: 如本协议所使用的，除非上下文另有要求，以下首字母大写术语具有以下含义：

rubric.en: As used herein
rubric.note: herein = in this Agreement

rubric.en: unless the context otherwise requires
rubric.note: 法律文书中的标准灵活性限定语
合同中定义的术语通常首字母大写

rubric.en: shall have the following meanings
rubric.note: shall 在合同中表示义务或确定性

questions.source: “Affiliate” shall mean, with respect to any Person, any other Person that directly or indirectly controls, is controlled by, or is under common control with such Person.
questions.reference: “关联方”是指就任何人士而言，直接或间接控制该人士、受该人士控制或与该人士受共同控制的任何其他人士。

rubric.note: affiliate 的范围大于 subsidiary（子公司）
定义条款的标准引导词

rubric.en: with respect to any Person
rubric.note: with respect to = 就……而言

rubric.en: directly or indirectly controls, is controlled by, or is under common control with
rubric.ideal: 直接或间接控制、受……控制或与……受共同控制
rubric.note: 三个并列关系：控制/受控制/共同控制

questions.source: “Confidential Information” shall mean all non-public information disclosed by one party to the other, whether orally, in writing, or in any other form, including without limitation trade secrets, business plans, financial data, and customer lists.
questions.reference: “保密信息”是指一方向另一方披露的所有非公开信息，无论以口头、书面或其他任何形式披露，包括但不限于商业秘密、商业计划、财务数据和客户名单。

rubric.note: 合同中最常见的定义术语之一
non-public 强调未向公众披露

rubric.en: whether orally, in writing, or in any other form
rubric.ideal: 无论以口头、书面或其他任何形式
rubric.note: 三种披露形式的并列

rubric.en: including without limitation
rubric.note: ⚠️ 不能只译为“包括”，必须体现“不限于”的含义
trade secrets 固定译法为“商业秘密”

groups.title: 练习E：中译英
groups.instruction: 将以下中文条款翻译为英文合同用语，完成后点击“提交 AI 批改”获取详细批改。

questions.source: “工作日”是指除星期六、星期日或中华人民共和国法定公共假期以外的任何日期。
questions.reference: “Business Day” shall mean any day other than a Saturday, Sunday, or any public holiday in the People’s Republic of China.

rubric.note: 合同中通常首字母大写作为定义术语

accept: shall refer to
rubric.note: 定义条款标准搭配
other than = 除……以外
public holiday 是标准法律用语

questions.source: “重大不利影响”是指任何单独或合计已经对公司的业务、财务状况或经营成果产生或可合理预期将产生重大不利影响的事件、变化或事项。
questions.reference: “Material Adverse Effect” shall mean any event, change, or occurrence that, individually or in the aggregate, has had or would reasonably be expected to have a material adverse effect on the business, financial condition, or results of operations of the Company.

rubric.note: MAE 是并购合同中的核心定义

rubric.ideal: individually or in the aggregate
accept: separately or in aggregate
rubric.note: in the aggregate = 合计

rubric.en: 已经产生或可合理预期将产生
rubric.ideal: has had or would reasonably be expected to have
accept: has caused or is reasonably expected to cause
has had or is expected to have
rubric.note: would reasonably be expected to = 可合理预期
results of operations 是财务/法律的固定搭配

questions.source: “损失”一词包括但不限于因违反本协议而产生或与之相关的任何及所有损害赔偿、责任、费用和开支（包括合理的律师费）。
questions.reference: The term “Losses” shall include, without limitation, any and all damages, liabilities, costs, and expenses (including reasonable attorneys’ fees) arising out of or in connection with any breach of this Agreement.

rubric.note: 合同中通常首字母大写

accept: include but not be limited to
rubric.note: 必须体现“不限于”
any and all 是法律文书中的强调搭配
attorneys’ fees 是法律文书标准用语

rubric.ideal: arising out of or in connection with
accept: arising out of or relating to
rubric.note: arising out of or in connection with 是法律文书中的标准因果搭配
breach 是合同违约的标准用词

sections.heading: 8. 今日小结
sections.html:
1. shall mean——定义条款的标准引导词，“X” shall mean... = “X”是指……
  2. shall have the meaning ascribed to it in——交叉引用定义的标准表达
  3. as used herein——限定术语适用范围为本协议
  4. unless the context otherwise requires——灵活性限定语，为定义留出解释空间
  5. affiliate——关联方（控制/受控制/共同控制关系）
  6. person（法律定义）——范围涵盖自然人和一切法人实体
  7. material——重大的、实质性的（非“物质的”），material breach = 重大违约
  8. including without limitation——包括但不限于，表示示例性而非穷尽性列举
  9. hereof / thereof——here- 和 there- 家族词，分别指代本协议和前文提到的事物
  10. set forth——载明、规定，as set forth in = 如……所载明的
  11. ascribe——赋予（含义），常与 meaning 搭配使用
  12. effective date / business day——合同中必定出现的基础定义术语
